title: Debug assertion constructAutomaticIndex: Assertion `!ExprHasProperty(pExpr, EP_FromJoin) || pExpr->iRightJoinTable!=pSrc->iCursor || pLoop->prereq!=0' failed
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INTEGER NOT NULL, c2 TEXT DEFAULT 'default');
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT c1 FROM t1 WHERE c1 IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2) VALUES (1, NULL);
SELECT * FROM v1 LEFT JOIN vt1 ON vt1.c1 = 'default' WHERE v1.c1 = 1;
key_bug_features: SELECT triggers assertion error with LEFT JOIN on view
